data.name: Sex and the Furry Titty 2: Sins of the City
data.detailed_description:
🍒 ADD OUR NEW GAME TO YOUR WISHLIST 🍒


關於此遊戲



Sex and the Furry Titty 2將會為您帶來更性感的故事，更多的美女以及更多與她們深入交流的方式！安裝時本遊戲就會附帶六個完全不同的故事，而在未來還會有更多的免費更新！你將會邂逅新的角色也會與熟悉的面孔重逢！這次還會有特典內容哦！



一起來探索這些更新，更好的故事吧，我們有著更多的激情和更加多樣的分支。我們嘗試了以第一人稱視角講述故事，添加了3p，並且更會讓我們的故事再上一個台階！
新情節也並不會影響我們的美術與色色片段。伴隨著新藝術家的加入，敬請期待我們帶來的更加火辣的cg與動畫。至於三消環節也經歷了一次升級，我們有了更多的階段性目標，更加平衡的遊戲性以及更棒的可玩性。


溫暖的夜風太棒了，就像是春天一樣……還有，派-對！你的朋友Marcelle 邀請你去他的兄弟會，而你也想找個人共度良宵，也有可能是徹夜不眠？


哇哦！ Elliott你個小雜種！終於邀請你那雍容華貴的女伴出來了！啊，多麼美妙的夜晚啊！燭光，琴聲，高級餐館。沒有什麼能夠影響這次夢幻般的約會，不管是生的好皮囊的服務生還是許久未見的好閨蜜。是吧？ ……


當然不會，先生!”我是來打掃你的房間的!她說。
“你到這兒來就是為了這個嗎?”那清理手辦呢?他回答道。
真是個令人難以忍受的書呆子!不管怎樣，他又帥又可愛，絕對值得一試!畢竟清潔服務太無聊了。她只需要以某種方式表明她的意圖。


好朋友總是會互相關心！尤其是發現有人雙向暗戀，按頭小分隊簡直如同百爪撓心。嘛，還有其他的方法能點燃愛情的火焰！沒有什麼比一局傳統的撲克遊戲更棒，當然要帶點特殊的火辣懲罰就是了。


她是拳台上的狂猛天使，來自金星的戰爭女神，無法接近的瓦爾基里，而他……他……他就是Ricky，就只是Ricky。當然，他算是個好男人- 但是真的能夠和如此威嚴，美麗的她般配嗎？沒關係，試一試也不會少塊肉？應該不會少吧？


啊，旖旎的氣氛，蠟燭，還有玫瑰……正是完美的向你的瓦倫丁展示你那些小癖好的時候，對吧？這是Luna與Lucas一起過的第一個情人節，所以他們都給彼此準備了驚喜。

遊戲特色


  • 五個性感的故事，其中既有新朋友也有老面孔！
  • 視覺小說風格的分支，選擇和決策制訂
  • 動畫可手動調整的性愛場景
  • 經典的三消玩法

data.short_description: Sex and the Furry Titty 2 將會帶給您更加性感的故事，更多的美女，以及更多樣的方式去和她們一起把身上弄髒！歡迎體驗六個擁有精心設計的路徑分支的新故事。探索每一條分支，贏得三消遊戲，並且準備好迎接動態且有配音的性愛情節吧！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB+
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: Sex and the Furry Titty 2: Sins of the City
data.detailed_description:
🍒 ADD OUR NEW GAME TO YOUR WISHLIST 🍒


About the Game



Sex and the Furry Titty 2 offers you even sexier stories, more ladies, and more ways to get dirty with them! Six all-new branching stories will be available on launch with more free content coming after the release! You'll get to meet new characters and check back with the ones you know! And there will even be a few cameos this time!



Explore new, improved stories with more exciting and diverse branching narratives. We're experimenting with POV stories, adding threesomes and generally turning it up a few notches!
The plot won’t take away from the artwork and sex scenes, either. With new artists joining the ranks, expect a visual feast with even hotter still images and improved animations. The puzzle sections are getting upgrades as well with new level objectives, improved balance and better overall feel.


The warm evening air outside is just wonderful, it smells like spring... and par-tay! Your friend Marcelle invites you out to their frat soiree and you are determined to find some good company for the evening. And maybe for the whole night, hmm?


Wow! Elliott you crafty S.O.B! Finally you got brave enough to ask your gorgeous woman out! Ah, what an evening it’s going to be! Candles, piano music, a fancy restaurant. Nothing is able to tear this dream date apart, not a pretty waiter nor the sudden arrival of a long-time-no-see girlfriend. Isn’t it, right?..


“Certainly not, mister! I am here but to clean your chambers!”, she says.
“Is that all you have come here for? What about… cleaning figurines?”, he replies.
What an insufferable nerd! Anyway, he is so handsome and cute… Definitely worth a try! Cleaning services are so boring, after all.
She only needs to make her intentions obvious somehow.


Best friends are always concerned for the well-being of their bros! Especially when it’s so devastating to look at both their mutual crush and inability to talk to each other.
Well, there are other ways to kindle a flame of love! Nothing beats a good old poker game. With special spicy punishments at stake, of course.


She is the fierce angel of the ring, the goddess of war, the unapproachable valkyrie, and he is… well. He is Ricky, just Ricky. He is a fine guy, of course - but is he even good enough for a majestic being like her?
Anyway, it won’t hurt to try to make a move? Will it??


Ah, the romantic atmosphere, candles and roses... A perfect time to reveal some of your secret kinks to your Valentine, isn't it? It's Luna and Lucas' first Valentine Day spent together, so both of them have prepared a surprise for each other.

Features

  • Five sexy stories featuring both your favourite returning characters and some brand new ones!
  • Branching narrative, choices, and decisions in style of a Visual Novel
  • Hand-animated sex scenes
  • Classic Match-3 gameplay

data.short_description: Sex and the Furry Titty 2 offers you even sexier stories, more ladies, and more ways to get dirty with them! Experience 6 new stories with an elaborate web of branching paths. Explore each one, win match-3 challenges, and get ready for hot animated VOICED sex scenes!
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • Processor: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 512MB+
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
